channel.title: UB Analytics · World Cup 2026 Predictions
channel.description: Matchday predictions with public track record.

item.title: Belgium vs Egypt: Belgium by 1 (53%)
item.description: Group G, 2026-06-15, Seattle. Belgium 53% / draw 28% / Egypt 19%. Predicted margin 1.

item.title: Saudi Arabia vs Uruguay: Uruguay by 1 (62%)
